comment: Hand-encoded 2026-meta goal graph seed (structure-first pass from the plan doc; content to be curated). Schema: kb/goal-node.schema.json. Weights: 10 = account-defining.

data.name: Zombie axe
data.notes: 2026 early-meta melee mainhand: broken zombie axe from armoured zombies, smith at 65 (boostable). Carries to whip-tier.

data.name: Moons of Peril armour sets
data.notes: Blood moon / blue moon / eclipse sets from Lunar Chests — early-game hybrid armour line, no GE needed.

data.name: Royal Titans prayers (Dead Eye / Mystic Vigor)
data.notes: Prayer scroll drops from the Royal Titans duo; cheap early power spike for ranged/magic.

data.name: Song of the Elves
data.notes: Gateway to Prifddinas, Zalcano, Gauntlet. Quest prereqs beyond the direct three resolve from derived quests.json.

data.name: Gauntlet practice supplies
data.notes: Consumables for learning attempts (CG itself is self-supplied inside). Re-enters the plan when stock depletes.

data.name: Bow of faerdhinen (corrupted)
data.notes: The mid-game account pivot. Enhanced seed ~1/50 CG (alternatives = crystal shard sources for the corruption cost: CG runs or Zalcano).

data.name: ToA — Osmumten's fang first
data.notes: 2026 raid ordering: fang-first ToA before CoX/ToB investment. Entry-level invocations viable pre-bowfa; scales after.

data.name: DT2 vestige rings
data.notes: Ultor/Magus/Venator/Bellator vestige grinds behind the four DT2 bosses.

data.name: Yama / Oathplate armour
data.notes: 2026 late-game melee line — Oathplate via Yama makes Bandos skippable entirely.

data.name: Sailing (optional parallel track)
data.notes: Optional parallel progression per 2026 meta — schedule as burnout-resistance interleave, never on the critical path.
